meaning: v.收集,聚集,集中,搜集adj.由收件人付款的adv.由收件人付款地
examples: Bezanik is diving to collect marine organisms.
I collect shells and interesting seaside items.
"Every single hotline call that we receive, we need to collect great data on that call, " says Myles.
Bucksbaum has staunchly resisted paying himself the outsize salaries that more flamboyant REIT managers collect.
